pages.title: Summary
pages.text: Wind power is the simplest form of electricity generation, requiring only a wind turbine controller and wind turbine blades to build a wind turbine.

pages.title: Wind Turbine Blades
pages.text: It can be placed on the side of any block.

pages.title: Wind Turbine Controller
pages.text: The core of the wind turbine, right clicking opens the GUI to view the status of power generation.
